name: california-kern
description: Kern County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: Kern County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past Kern County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('Kern County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: Kern County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract Kern County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link. Construct externalId as 'california-kern-supervisor-{district}' using the district number.
hints: externalId: construct as 'california-kern-supervisor-{district}' using the district number
The HTML provided is truncated and currently shows only the header and navigation menus, with no visible table or list containing the representatives.
Representative data is likely located within a container with class 'vi-temp-message-container' or a similar dynamic widget structure once the page fully loads.
Photo URLs are expected to be relative paths (e.g., '/DefaultContent/Default/_gfx/...') requiring absolutization to the base URL.
The 'detailUrl' will likely be found in an 'href' attribute of an anchor tag within the representative's row or card.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for Kern County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: Kern County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for Kern County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: Kern County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
